template_name: CAC Measures for Labeling AI-Generated and Synthesized Content
source_legislation: Measures for Labeling AI-Generated and Synthesized Content (Cyberspace Administration of China, 2025)

provisions.description: Internet information service providers using generative AI shall add explicit visible labels to AI-generated content including text superscripts, audio cues, and graphic watermarks that persist across sharing and download

sub_provisions.description: AI-generated text content shall bear explicit visible labels such as superscript annotations
AI-generated audio and visual content shall bear explicit visible labels such as audio cues and graphic watermarks

evaluation.message: At least one disclosure_labeling record is required — CAC measures mandate explicit visible labels on all AI-generated content
Every disclosure_labeling record must specify the presentation method (e.g., visible_icon_plus_text, audio_cue, text_superscript) — CAC requires explicit visible labeling
Disclosure labeling records should specify label_type to categorize the kind of explicit label applied
Disclosure labeling records should specify the locale (e.g., zh-CN) for proper language-appropriate labeling

provisions.description: Service providers shall embed implicit metadata labels in AI-generated content containing provider identification, content identifier, content type, and reference number, enabling machine-readable provenance verification

sub_provisions.description: Implicit metadata must include provider name/code, content ID, content type, and reference number
Implicit metadata labels shall persist across content sharing, downloading, and redistribution

evaluation.message: At least one transparency_marking record is required — CAC measures mandate implicit metadata labels embedded in AI-generated content
Every transparency_marking record must specify marking_scheme_id to identify the implicit labeling scheme used (e.g., cn-cac-implicit-label-2025)
Transparency marking records for CAC compliance must have jurisdiction set to 'CN' to indicate Chinese regulatory applicability
Transparency marking records should specify the content modality (text, image, audio, video, multimodal) for jurisdiction-specific validation
Transparency marking records should specify the metadata_container describing where implicit metadata is embedded (e.g., file-header, exif)

provisions.description: Service providers are encouraged to apply digital watermarks to AI-generated content for robustness against tampering, compression, and format conversion, complementing explicit and implicit labeling

sub_provisions.description: Digital watermarks should be robust against common transformations including compression, cropping, and format conversion

evaluation.message: CAC measures encourage digital watermarks for AI-generated content — at least one transparency_marking record should have watermark_applied set to true
Transparency marking records with watermarks should specify the watermark_family (e.g., spectral_embedding, robust-imperceptible) for interoperability
Transparency marking records with watermarks should include a verification_method_ref pointing to the detection or verification mechanism

provisions.description: Service providers shall retain event logs for AI-generated content for a minimum of 6 months (180 days), particularly when explicit labels are omitted at user request, to enable regulatory audit and platform verification

sub_provisions.description: When explicit labeling is omitted at user request, the provider must retain audit logs for a minimum of 6 months
Platform operators must implement content verification duties and maintain logs for regulatory compliance

evaluation.message: At least one event_log record is required — CAC measures mandate retention of event logs for AI-generated content for regulatory audit purposes
Event log evidence must be within the 180-day (6-month) retention window — CAC mandates 6-month log retention for unlabeled content and platform verification
Every event_log record must have an event_type field for structured log categorization supporting regulatory audit
Event log records should include correlation_id for traceability across related events and content generation sessions
Event logs with label_exception=true indicate content where explicit labeling was omitted at user request, triggering the mandatory 6-month retention obligation
